name: Warangal Fort
description: Historic Kakatiya fort ruins with stone gateways and open-air monuments.

name: Thousand Pillar Temple
description: Important Kakatiya-era temple known for carved pillars and architecture.

name: Bhadrakali Temple
description: Lakeside temple with a peaceful setting and strong local significance.

name: Ramappa Temple
description: UNESCO-listed temple near Warangal with detailed Kakatiya stone work.

name: Laknavaram Lake
description: Lake destination with greenery, a suspension bridge, and boating options.

name: Pakhal Lake
description: Scenic lake near Warangal for a quieter nature-focused outing.

name: Kakatiya Musical Garden
description: Family-friendly garden close to Bhadrakali Lake for an evening stop.
